data.title: Encryption Standards
data.technical_spec: Implements TLS 1.3 for secure data transmission.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Monitors and filters HTTP traffic between a web application and the Internet.
data.technical_spec: Deploys rules using machine learning for real-time threat detection.

data.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
data.description: Ensures only authorized users can access sensitive information.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes OAuth 2.0 and SAML for user authentication and authorization.

data.title: Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular inspections to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Employs automated vulnerability scanning tools like Nessus and manual security testing.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protects against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Integrates services like Cloudflare or Akamai for traffic analysis and mitigation.
